rationale: Both papers are closely aligned in domain and method: each is a theoretical game-theoretic model of online/search advertising auctions with endogenous economic outcomes (the cited paper endogenizes ad-slot valuation via downstream pricing; the citing paper endogenizes publishers’ pricing-scheme choice). The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior online advertising pricing research, making this cited 2011 JMRK article a plausible foundational/comparison source rather than an incidental mention.
